prestazioni: Engine swap to a Toyota 2GR-FKS 3.5L V6 (from the Lexus RC F) with a Magnuson TVS2300 supercharger (8.5 psi boost), paired with a custom AEM V2 water-methanol injection system (50/50 mix) to mitigate heat soak and prevent knock on 93 octane fuel. The stock 8-speed automatic transmission is replaced with a Tremec TR-6060 6-speed manual (from the Camaro SS) with a South Bend Clutch Stage 3 twin-disc setup for durability under 500+ lb-ft of torque.

Full bolt-on forced induction support for the stock 3.5L 2GR-FKS (engine code in Trail Edition: 2GR-FKS) including a Garrett GTX3582R turbo (1.06 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe (by Burns Stainless), a PTP Turbo Smart 45mm wastegate, and a Turbosmart Kompact 50mm blow-off valve. The intercooler is upgraded to a CSF Racing 4-core bar-and-plate unit with a 3-inch inlet/outlet and integrated water sprayer for track use.

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins TTX46 coilovers (24-way adjustable damping, 2.5-inch diameter monotube design) paired with a custom 3-link rear suspension setup (by Total Chaos Fabrication) to eliminate the stock leaf springs. Front upper control arms are replaced with Camburg KINETIC UCAs (uniball joint, 2.5-inch drop) and the rear is fitted with Icon Vehicle Dynamics Delta Joint UCAs for improved articulation and durability. Braking is upgraded to a full AP Racing CP9660 big brake kit (6-piston front, 4-piston rear) with 2-piece rotors and Ferodo DS2500 pads for track use.
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a Liberty Walk LB Works Tacoma kit (bolt-on fenders, front/rear bumpers, and side skirts) with a 3-inch extended wheelbase to accommodate the 2GR-FKS swap and forced induction setup. The kit is finished in a custom matte military green (PPG DBC9900) with a satin black roof and bed cap (by ARE Accessories, fiberglass construction).

Wheel setup consists of Volk Racing TE37V (18x10.5 +15 front, 18x11 +12 rear) with Nitto Ridge Grappler tires (285/65R18 front, 295/65R18 rear) for off-road capability, paired with a custom 2-inch lift (via Ohlins coilovers) and fender flares trimmed for tire clearance. The bed is fitted with a custom aluminum flatbed (by AluFab) with integrated roll cage (by Custom Cages) and a full-length aluminum skid plate (by C4 Fab) for underbody protection.

Aerodynamic and functional upgrades include a custom carbon fiber hood (by Seibon) with a 3-inch cowl scoop for intercooler airflow, a custom rear diffuser (by Rocket Bunny) with integrated LED light bar (by Baja Designs, Squadron Sport), and a front splitter (by APR Performance) with adjustable canards. The interior is stripped and refitted with a full Sparco Pro2000 seat kit (6-point harnesses), a custom aluminum dash (by AIM MXS Strada), and a full carbon fiber trim kit (by Seibon) for weight reduction.
